title: [PropertyGroups]
text: [PropertyGroups] This section, as defined in the uproperties.ini file, defines one or more property groups which can be used by property definitions instead of (multiple) lists of individual properties. Each line specifies a single property group. Property groups are used for easy reference, for example when several widgets share the same group of properties. Syntax Explain this code [propertygroups] PropertyGroupId = PropertyId1{;PropertyId2{...;PropertyIdN}} Copy See the following table for syntax details: Table 1. PropertyGroups syntax description Syntax Description PropertyGroupId Specifies the name or id of the property group; note that is always prefixed with grp: PropertyId Specifies a single property using its PropertyId , including its (optional) prefix, or another property group. Example: Explain this code grp:ux_field=grp:flex_item;grp:grid_item grp:ux_editable=html:readonly;html:disabled grp:ux_text_common=html:placeholder grp:ux_text=grp:ux_text_common;html:maxlength;html:minlength;html:spellcheck grp:ux_text_field=grp:ux_field;grp:ux_editable;grp:ux_prefix_suffix;grp:ux_change_button;grp:ux_text;html:pattern;html:type;html:size;label-text Copy Related Links uproperties.ini The uproperties.ini file defines the syntax of properties as well as property groups for web widgets.
